templates.name: Fitness Foundation
templates.description: A basic fitness quest line building from fundamentals to consistency.

overquest.name: Fitness Foundation
overquest.description: Complete a foundational fitness journey from basics to routine.

quests.name: First Workout
quests.description: Complete your first real workout session.

quests.name: Three Day Streak
quests.description: Work out three days in a row.

quests.name: One Week Consistent
quests.description: Maintain a workout routine for one full week.

templates.name: Knowledge Seeker
templates.description: A learning quest line progressing from curiosity to mastery.

overquest.name: Knowledge Seeker
overquest.description: Pursue a complete learning journey in a subject of your choice.

quests.name: Pick a Subject
quests.description: Choose a topic you want to learn deeply.

quests.name: Read for One Hour
quests.description: Spend one focused hour reading about your subject.

quests.name: Take Notes
quests.description: Summarize what you learned in your own words.

quests.name: Teach Someone
quests.description: Explain what you learned to another person.

quests.name: Apply the Knowledge
quests.description: Use what you learned in a practical project or situation.

templates.name: Social Butterfly
templates.description: Build social skills step by step from small talks to deep connections.

overquest.name: Social Butterfly
overquest.description: Develop your social confidence through progressive challenges.

quests.name: Say Hi to a Stranger
quests.description: Greet someone you don't know in a friendly way.

quests.name: Have a 5-Minute Conversation
quests.description: Engage in a conversation lasting at least 5 minutes with someone new.

quests.name: Plan a Group Activity
quests.description: Organize and lead a social gathering or group activity.

templates.name: Daily Discipline
templates.description: Build a daily routine habit stack.

overquest.name: Daily Discipline
overquest.description: Establish unbreakable daily habits through progressive commitment.

quests.name: Wake Up on Time
quests.description: Wake up at your target time for 3 consecutive days.

quests.name: Morning Routine
quests.description: Complete a defined morning routine for 5 days.

quests.name: Evening Wind-Down
quests.description: Follow an evening routine with no screens for 5 days.

quests.name: Full Day Structure
quests.description: Follow your complete daily schedule for one full week.

templates.name: Creative Sprint
templates.description: A short creative project from ideation to completion.

overquest.name: Creative Sprint
overquest.description: Complete a creative project from concept to finished work.

quests.name: Brainstorm Ideas
quests.description: Generate at least 10 ideas for a creative project.

quests.name: Create a Draft
quests.description: Produce a rough first version of your chosen idea.

quests.name: Refine and Polish
quests.description: Iterate on your draft until you're satisfied with the result.

quests.name: Share Your Work
quests.description: Present or publish your finished creative work.
